product_overview: The ATLAS AI Incubator is a comprehensive platform designed to empower users with AI-driven business analysis and venture management tools. It integrates advanced features including AI-powered SWOT, PESTEL, and Lean Canvas frameworks, user authentication, team collaboration, and subscription management, facilitating strategic decision-making for startups and enterprises.
core_goals: Provide robust AI-powered business analysis tools that generate actionable insights using advanced strategic frameworks like SWOT, PESTEL, and Lean Canvas.
Enable users to create, manage, and track business ventures effectively with detailed analysis histories and profile customization.
Support seamless team collaboration by allowing users to invite members and manage access roles within ventures.
Ensure secure and reliable user authentication, subscription management, and multi-language support for a global user base.
Deliver a high-quality, maintainable, and scalable platform with comprehensive automated testing covering frontend and backend components.
key_features: User Authentication system using JWT with email/password login and an admin demo mode for easy onboarding.
AI-powered Business Analysis Generation supporting multiple frameworks such as SWOT, PESTEL, and Lean Canvas with multi-language options.
Venture Management capabilities including creating, editing, and retrieving ventures and associated analyses.
Analysis History for viewing and managing previous analysis results linked to ventures.
User Profile Management with options to update preferences and language settings supporting internationalization.
Subscription Management integrated with payment solutions to handle user subscriptions seamlessly.
Team Collaboration tools allowing users to invite team members, assign roles, and manage access rights within ventures.
Export Functionality enabling users to export analysis results in various formats for reporting and presentation.
Undo/Redo Functionality to manage state changes within the application enhancing user experience and error correction.
Comprehensive Testing Suite integrating unit, integration, and end-to-end tests using Vitest, Jest, and Playwright to ensure reliability and performance.
user_flow_summary: User registration and login through a secure authentication interface, including an admin demo mode for easy evaluation.
Users create a new venture providing essential details and then initiate AI-powered business analysis using chosen strategic frameworks.
Users view analysis results and can navigate to historical records for past ventures and analyses.
Users manage their profiles including updating personal information and language preferences for localized experience.
Team owners invite collaborators to ventures, assigning roles to control access and facilitate collaboration.
Users subscribe to premium plans via integrated payment systems to unlock advanced features.
Users export analysis reports into preferred formats for offline use or sharing.
State management supports undo/redo actions during analysis editing or venture configuration.
Tests run automatically in CI/CD pipeline verifying component functionality, API endpoints, and end-to-end user scenarios for quality assurance.
validation_criteria: All authentication flows must support secure login, registration, and admin demo access with JWT tokens validated.
AI analysis generation must produce accurate and contextually relevant reports for SWOT, PESTEL, Lean Canvas, and other specified frameworks.
Venture creation and retrieval endpoints should operate with correct data persistence and retrieval consistency.
User profile updates and language preferences must be reflected correctly in the UI and backend data stores.
Team invitation and role assignment functions must deliver email invitations and maintain access controls.
Subscription processing should correctly handle payment transactions, status updates, and access level enforcement.
Exported analysis documents must conform to requested formats without data loss or corruption.
Undo and redo functionality must reliably track and reverse user actions without state inconsistencies.
Automated test coverage should meet or exceed 70% overall, with critical components achieving 80%+ coverage.
End-to-end tests must validate user journeys including login, venture management, analysis generation, collaboration, and export features without failures.
